narrative_beat: Close-up frontal de um homem brasileiro comum, suando, iluminado por luz vermelha lateral, convocacao pessoal

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a mature anonymous Brazilian man in his forties, sweat beading on his forehead and temples, eyes partially hidden in deep shadow, strong jaw clenched, crimson light casting across the left side of his face revealing pores and stubble
subject.focal_point: the sweat droplets on the forehead catching red light
subject.secondary: desaturated black-and-white living room furniture blurred behind him

environment.time_of_day: night, single red lamp as only source
environment.atmosphere: personal confrontation, you are being addressed directly

composition.foreground: face in warm crimson and amber tones filling 70% of frame
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white living room dissolving into darkness

lighting.key_light: harsh crimson light from left at 90 degrees, raking across face
lighting.fill_light: faint amber bounce from below chin
lighting.rim_light: thin gold edge on right ear and jaw
lighting.shadow_quality: deep hard-edged, half the face in total darkness

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, visible skin pores and sweat, floating orange embers at edges

mood.emotion: personal summons, you cannot look away

symbolism.primary: the everyman who must decide — this face is the viewer
symbolism.secondary: red light as warning, sweat as urgency

negative_as_positive: anonymous silhouette-style face, features partially obscured in shadow, no identifiable real person
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
